subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who, through the tongue of His grandeur, speaketh in all conditions that which was uttered before the creation of the heavens and of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ینطق لسان عظمته فیکل الاحوال بما نطق قبل خلق السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution
